headline: B2B Buyers Now Research in AI Before They Talk to Sales
summary: With most of the B2B buying journey self-directed and generative AI now a leading research source, visibility for B2B brands increasingly depends on appearing in AI answers, not only in search rankings. B2B Buyers Now Research in AI Before They Talk to Sales — NEWMEDIA.COM RankOS™ Most of the B2B buying journey is now self-directed and AI-mediated. Gartner finds ~67% of buyers prefer a rep-free experience and Forrester finds generative AI is the top research source. The graphic shows how AI engi

thumbnail.caption: Most of the B2B buying journey is now self-directed and AI-mediated. Gartner finds ~67% of buyers prefer a rep-free experience and Forrester finds generative AI is the top research source. The graphic shows how AI engines assemble the shortlist and how NEWMEDIA.COM uses RankOS™ to move brands from cited to recommended.

headline: Does Strong Q1 Beat, Raised Guidance and Buybacks Change The Bull Case For Gartner (IT)?
summary: Earlier this year, Gartner reported a strong first quarter, beating analyst EPS expectations, raising full-year adjusted EBITDA, adjusted EPS and free cash flow guidance, and repurchasing about US$535,000,000 of stock amid solid demand for digital transformation insights. This combination of improved guidance and sizeable buybacks signals management confidence in the business model’s resilience and the value of its research franchise. Next, we’ll examine how Gartner’s upgraded full-year...

headline: The new CMO playbook: how marketers are balancing broader remits and tighter budgets
summary: Marketing leaders at Cannes Lions discuss their expanding list of responsibilities, AI’s threat to creativity and the importance of having a CMO on the C-suite
